title: slot-recon online-check: release slot when GitHub-online but no local container
description: release_stale_slots only frees slots whose runner_id is gone from GitHub; must also handle runner online at GitHub with no local container carrying ezgha.runner_id label. 409 self-heal (c63cc81) masks most cases.
